sections.label: TOOL CALL: python
sections.content:
<tool_call>
<function=python>
<parameter=code>
# Try RIGHT to extend trail
result = action(['RIGHT'])
print("Result:", last_action_result)

seg = current_frame.segmentation
nodes = seg['nodes']

# Check trail
trail_elements = [n for n in nodes if n['color'] in ['g', 'w'] and 15 <= n['boundary'][0][1] <= 50 and n['boundary'][0][0] < 50]
if trail_elements:
    max_col = max([max(p[1] for p in t['boundary']) for t in trail_elements])
    min_col = min([min(p[1] for p in t['boundary']) for t in trail_elements])
    trail_rows = set()
    for t in trail_elements:
        for p in t['boundary']:
            trail_rows.add(p[0])
    print(f"Trail: cols {min_col}-{max_col}, rows: {sorted(trail_rows)}")

# Check blue target
blue_targets = [n for n in nodes if n['color'] == 'b' and n['boundary'][0][0] < 50]
for bt in blue_targets:
    print(f"Blue: pixels={bt['pixels']} boundary={bt['boundary']}")

# Check green target
green_targets = [n for n in nodes if n['color'] == 'N' and n['boundary'][0][0] < 50]
for gt in green_targets:
    print(f"Green: pixels={gt['pixels']} boundary={gt['boundary']}")
</parameter>
</function>
</tool_call>
